commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an embedded-agent subscriber fast path that reuses incremental plain text deltas while keeping full parsing for directive-bearing, final, silent, media/reply/audio, and replacement-like streams, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +59, Tests +65. Total +124 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence reproduction was established for the full related Windows starvation report. Source inspection does show the central PR premise on current main: emitted text updates reparse the accumulated cleaned stream on each update.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This protected maintainer PR changes assistant message-delivery state, and the remaining action is maintainer proof-bar and merge-risk judgment rather than an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(agents): avoid full stream replay on text deltas
target.body:
## Summary
- avoid reparsing the full accumulated assistant stream for ordinary plain text deltas in the embedded subscriber
- keep full reply-directive parsing for `text_end`, silent tokens, media/reply/audio directives, replacement-like chunks, and directive-bearing deltas
- also keep phase-aware final-answer streams incremental when the visible delta exactly reconstructs the current cleaned text
- add regressions for held directive tails and stripped directive metadata staying out of later deltas

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification
- Rebased onto `origin/main` at `cd3d960ec5f73a7d8c3f77b797146cecbfd6aff0`; later `origin/main` movement did not touch the two changed files.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed after final rebase.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts` - passed after final rebase.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts` - passed after final rebase.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 1 file / 33 tests passed after final rebase.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 1 file / 8 tests passed after final rebase.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings; `overall: patch is correct (0.84)` after final rebase.
- Blacksmith Testbox-through-Crabbox attempted but blocked by auth: `not authenticated — run 'blacksmith auth login' first`.
- AWS Crabbox changed gate after final rebase: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`; provider `aws`, lease `cbx_3b25a1934730`, slug `jade-shrimp`, run `run_f0c8cc17886b`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Plain assistant text deltas no longer force full accumulated reply-directive parsing on every chunk while directive-bearing, final, silent, media/reply/audio, and replacement-like paths keep the canonical full parse.
Real environment tested: Focused local Vitest wrapper, formatting/lint checks, autoreview, and AWS Crabbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section above.
Evidence after fix: Focused subscriber and block-reply regression tests pass after rebasing onto current `origin/main`; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed on the refreshed branch.
Observed result after fix: Ordinary plain deltas reuse the incremental visible delta instead of replaying the full accumulated stream, while incomplete directive tails and previously stripped directives stay suppressed.
What was not tested: Live Ollama/API runtime was not rerun for this focused subscriber hot-path PR.
